name: testVisibilityAcquirersListControlTab
description: The visibility of elements in the 'Acquirers List' control panel
descriptionHtml: The visibility of elements in the 'Acquirers List' control panel

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: The visibility of elements in the 'Acquirers List' control panel

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: Add Acquirer Button is visible
Verify: Select Acquirer label is visible
Verify: Reset Filter Button is visible
Verify: Refresh data Button is visible
